title: Pan-Seared Bao with Pistachio Teriyaki Sauce
description: A modern twist on traditional Japanese dishes, this recipe combines crispy bao with a sweet and savory pistachio teriyaki sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, and grated ginger.
3. Add the pistachios to the bowl and blend until smooth.
4. Brush the bao with vegetable oil and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
5. Brush the cooked bao with the teriyaki sauce.
6. Sprinkle with green onions and serve immediately.
